name: A supply shop
description:
Supplies are crammed together on the shelves of this small shop inside the Last
Homely House.  Being one of the last stops between here and East Arda, the
Homely House Shop is designed to carry supplies for both the local elvish
community and the travellers heading over High Pass.  The scent of leather and
hide wafts past your nose.  There is a sign on one wall.
